animals.name: Rat
animals.personality: Rats are among the most resourceful and intelligent of the zodiac animals. Quick-witted, charming, and highly adaptable, they thrive in complex social environments and have an extraordinary ability to find opportunity where others see only obstacle. Their sharp minds and warm sociability make them natural networkers. At their shadow side, Rats can be calculating, hoarding, and prone to anxiety.

notes.RAT: With another Rat, you share a quick mind and a knack for opportunity. Two clever schemers can build something remarkable, provided neither tries to outmanoeuvre the other.
notes.OX: The steadfast Ox grounds your restless intelligence beautifully. You bring the ideas and charm while the Ox supplies the patience to see them through — a rare and enduring harmony.
notes.TIGER: The bold Tiger commands a room you would rather work quietly behind. You can respect each other's drive, but their directness and your subtlety keep a polite distance between you.
notes.RABBIT: The gentle Rabbit's caution can puzzle your fast-moving mind, yet there is no real friction here. Treat their sensitivity with care and you will find a calm, pleasant companion.
notes.DRAGON: The magnetic Dragon dazzles you, and you happily lend your cleverness to their grand vision. Together you are ambitious, lucky, and almost unstoppable.
notes.SNAKE: The watchful Snake matches your strategic mind, though their secrecy can leave you guessing. With mutual trust this becomes a thoughtful, balanced alliance.
notes.HORSE: The Horse is your direct opposite in the zodiac, and their impulsive freedom unsettles your need for security. This pairing demands constant compromise to avoid friction.
notes.GOAT: The tender Goat lives by feeling where you live by wit. Neither helps nor hinders the other much, but kindness on your part keeps things gracefully even.
notes.MONKEY: The inventive Monkey is your perfect playmate — quick, witty, and endlessly entertaining. You scheme and laugh in the same key, making this one of your finest bonds.
notes.ROOSTER: The exacting Rooster's blunt criticism grates against your sensitive pride. You both value cleverness, but their need to correct and your need to charm rarely settle comfortably.
notes.DOG: The loyal Dog offers steadiness you can trust, even if their worries dim your optimism. With patience this is a workable, dependable connection.
notes.PIG: The good-natured Pig enjoys your charm and asks little in return. A relaxed, agreeable pairing, though you must resist the urge to take advantage of their easy trust.

2026.overall: The Year of the Horse creates some tension for Rats — Horse and Rat are in opposition in the Chinese zodiac. This is not a year for dramatic expansion but for consolidation, deepening, and careful management of what already exists. Focus on strengthening existing relationships and systems rather than beginning major new ventures. Those who use 2026 for inner development and relationship strengthening will find 2027 opens powerfully.
2026.career: Maintain and deepen current professional relationships. This is not a year to change jobs or start new ventures.
2026.relationships: Existing relationships benefit enormously from attention and care this year. New significant relationships are better begun in 2027.
2026.health: Anxiety management is the key health focus. Establish strong daily practices for mental wellbeing.
2026.finance: Conservative management. Protect savings and avoid risk.

monthlyFortune.1: January brings clarity after recent confusion. A decision you have been avoiding becomes clear.
monthlyFortune.2: February is your strongest month this year. Significant positive development in career or finances.
monthlyFortune.3: March asks for patience with a difficult person or situation. Perseverance is rewarded later.
monthlyFortune.4: April is challenging. Maintain your long-term perspective and avoid reactive decisions.
monthlyFortune.5: May brings welcome relief and positive social connections.
monthlyFortune.6: June favours communication and negotiation. Agreements reached now are favourable.
monthlyFortune.7: July is quiet but productive. Deep work done now pays off in September.
monthlyFortune.8: August brings recognition and possibly financial reward for previous work.
monthlyFortune.9: September offers an important opportunity. Be ready to act quickly.
monthlyFortune.10: October requires careful navigation of a complex situation. Seek trusted advice.
monthlyFortune.11: November is your second strongest month. Significant positive movement in key areas.
monthlyFortune.12: December brings good closure to the year. Rest and reflect with genuine satisfaction.

animals.name: Ox
animals.personality: The Ox is the zodiac's most reliable and diligent worker — patient, methodical, and possessed of extraordinary endurance. Ox people are not flashy but they are deeply dependable, and over time their consistent effort produces remarkable results. They value stability, tradition, and practical achievement. At their shadow side, Oxen can be stubborn to the point of self-defeat and struggle to adapt when circumstances change.

notes.RAT: The clever Rat brings spark and ideas to your steady world. You supply the patience and follow-through their quick minds often lack — a warm, complementary union built to last.
notes.OX: With another Ox, you share an unshakeable work ethic and deep loyalty. Two such determined souls move slowly but surely, though you must guard against matching stubbornness.
notes.TIGER: The headstrong Tiger charges where you prefer to plod, and their impulsiveness tests your patience sorely. This pairing strains under two immovable wills pulling different ways.
notes.RABBIT: The diplomatic Rabbit appreciates the security you offer, and you find their gentleness restful. Neither demands much of the other, making for a calm and civil bond.
notes.DRAGON: The flamboyant Dragon's grand gestures clash with your grounded practicality. You see vanity where they see vision, and the friction wears at you both over time.
notes.SNAKE: The wise Snake shares your love of patience and quiet depth. You trust their judgement and they value your steadiness — a serene and remarkably stable partnership.
notes.HORSE: The restless Horse cannot abide your measured pace, and you cannot abide their inconstancy. Freedom against stability makes this a wearing match.
notes.GOAT: The sensitive Goat's worries and your inflexibility rub uncomfortably together. Their need for reassurance meets your reserve, and harmony proves hard to find.
notes.MONKEY: The lively Monkey amuses and quickens you, and your reliability anchors their flightiness. A surprisingly good fit when you let their playfulness lighten your seriousness.
notes.ROOSTER: The diligent Rooster shares your respect for hard work done precisely right. You admire their standards and they your endurance — a productive, mutually respectful bond.
notes.DOG: The faithful Dog values the dependability you embody, and you trust their honest heart. A steady, undramatic connection grounded in shared loyalty.
notes.PIG: The good-natured Pig offers easy warmth that softens your serious nature. Neither troubles the other, and a comfortable, kindly rapport grows between you.

2026.overall: The Year of the Horse is a productive year for Ox people who are willing to move at a slightly faster pace than usual. Horse energy rewards those who can combine Ox diligence with a degree of Horse spontaneity. Career momentum is strong throughout the year. A partnership or collaboration begun in Spring carries significant long-term potential.
2026.career: Career advances through consistent excellence. A new collaboration offers exciting expansion.
2026.relationships: A partnership deepens significantly. For single Oxen, a new relationship begun in spring has long-term potential.
2026.health: Physical health is strong. Focus on mental flexibility as your primary wellness practice.
2026.finance: Steady growth. Investments in education or property are favoured.

monthlyFortune.1: January is steady and productive. Lay careful groundwork for what you want to achieve this year.
monthlyFortune.2: February brings an unexpected challenge. Your characteristic patience is your best response.
monthlyFortune.3: March opens powerfully. A new opportunity or partnership emerges — embrace it.
monthlyFortune.4: April is excellent for financial decisions and long-term planning.
monthlyFortune.5: May brings warm social energy. Relationships of all kinds benefit from your attention.
monthlyFortune.6: June is your strongest month. Major positive developments in career and relationships.
monthlyFortune.7: July asks for adaptability. A situation shifts unexpectedly — your flexibility determines the outcome.
monthlyFortune.8: August is challenging. Maintain your course and do not make reactive changes.
monthlyFortune.9: September brings harvest energy. Work done carefully in the first half of the year shows results.
monthlyFortune.10: October is socially rich. Connections made now are valuable long-term.
monthlyFortune.11: November brings a decision point. Your deliberate approach serves you well here.
monthlyFortune.12: December ends the year with quiet satisfaction and genuine gratitude.

animals.name: Tiger
animals.personality: Tigers are natural leaders — brave, charismatic, and fiercely independent. They pursue their goals with intensity and rarely accept defeat. Their generosity and warmth draw people to them, but their stubbornness and short temper can create conflict. Tigers are at their best when they have a worthy challenge to rise to.

notes.RAT: The shrewd Rat works in subtleties you find tiresome, preferring strategy to your direct charge. There is no quarrel here, only a respectful difference in tempo.
notes.OX: The immovable Ox meets your headstrong will with equal stubbornness. You respect each other's strength, but neither bends easily, so progress can stall.
notes.TIGER: With another Tiger, the room is never short of courage or ego. Two such leaders can inspire greatness together or compete for the same throne — passion runs high either way.
notes.RABBIT: The gentle Rabbit's caution balances your boldness without challenging it. You may find their reserve puzzling, but treated kindly they offer a soothing counterpoint.
notes.DRAGON: The mighty Dragon matches your fire and ambition, two grand spirits sharing the stage. Mutual admiration carries you far, provided you take turns to lead.
notes.SNAKE: The secretive Snake's quiet calculation unsettles your open nature. You crave directness while they prefer the shadows, and the mistrust between you is hard to dispel.
notes.HORSE: The free-spirited Horse runs at your pace and shares your thirst for adventure. Warm, spirited, and bold together, this is one of your most exhilarating bonds.
notes.GOAT: The tender Goat needs gentleness you must remember to offer. Your strength can shelter them, and their softness eases you, when temper is kept in check.
notes.MONKEY: The cunning Monkey delights in outwitting you, and you bristle at being outmanoeuvred. Their tricks and your pride make for a wary, prickly pairing.
notes.ROOSTER: The critical Rooster's exacting eye finds fault with your impulsiveness. You can coexist, but their corrections and your independence keep a careful distance between you.
notes.DOG: The loyal Dog believes in your causes and stands faithfully at your side. Their devotion steadies your fire — a deeply trusting and protective union.
notes.PIG: The generous Pig admires your courage and gives warmth without rivalry. You shield them gladly, and a comfortable, affectionate bond results.

2026.overall: The Year of the Horse brings powerful momentum for Tigers. Your natural boldness finds fertile ground this year — opportunities that seemed blocked begin to open. Career advancement is strongly favoured in the first half of the year. Relationships deepen if you choose vulnerability over pride. Financial growth is possible but requires discipline — avoid impulsive investments in the summer months.
2026.career: Leadership opportunities will appear unexpectedly. Accept them. Your natural authority is particularly respected this year.
2026.relationships: A significant relationship deepens or a new important one begins. Vulnerability is your strength this year, not weakness.
2026.health: Pay attention to stress management. Tigers tend to push through until they collapse. Schedule genuine rest.
2026.finance: Strong growth potential but avoid speculation between June and September.

monthlyFortune.1: January brings fresh energy. New initiatives launched now carry strong Tiger momentum.
monthlyFortune.2: February calls for patience. Old matters require resolution before new ones can begin.
monthlyFortune.3: March opens with unexpected opportunity in your professional life. Move quickly.
monthlyFortune.4: April is your strongest month this year. Major decisions made now carry lasting positive impact.
monthlyFortune.5: May asks for generosity. What you give freely now returns significantly later.
monthlyFortune.6: June requires careful financial management. Avoid major purchases or investments.
monthlyFortune.7: July brings relationship clarity. Important conversations that have been delayed become unavoidable — and ultimately beneficial.
monthlyFortune.8: August favours creative projects and unexpected collaborations.
monthlyFortune.9: September is a challenging month. Maintain patience and your long-term perspective.
monthlyFortune.10: October marks a turning point. What has been building since April now bears visible fruit.
monthlyFortune.11: November brings recognition for work done well. Accept it with grace.
monthlyFortune.12: December asks for reflection and preparation. Plan carefully for the year ahead.

animals.name: Rabbit
animals.personality: Rabbits are the gentle diplomats of the zodiac — refined, sensitive, and gifted with an instinct for harmony. They move through life with grace and tact, preferring quiet influence to open confrontation. Their aesthetic sensibility and emotional intelligence make them treasured companions and thoughtful advisors. At their shadow side, Rabbits can be conflict-avoidant, overly cautious, and inclined to withdraw when life grows demanding.

notes.RAT: The quick, calculating Rat moves faster than you find comfortable, and their ambition can feel abrasive to your gentle spirit. This pairing asks for patience you may struggle to sustain.
notes.OX: The steady Ox offers the security you quietly crave, and you soften their seriousness in return. Neither disturbs the other, making for a calm, agreeable companionship.
notes.TIGER: The bold Tiger's intensity overwhelms your delicate sensibilities at first, yet their protectiveness can shelter you. Approached carefully, there is more warmth here than friction.
notes.RABBIT: With another Rabbit, life is refined, harmonious, and beautifully gentle. Two diplomats create a serene haven together, though someone must eventually make the hard decisions.
notes.DRAGON: The domineering Dragon's grand intensity easily overpowers your tender nature. You retreat where they advance, and their impatience leaves you feeling unseen.
notes.SNAKE: The elegant Snake shares your love of beauty and quiet, though their secrecy can trouble your sensitive heart. A graceful, low-conflict bond when trust is nurtured.
notes.HORSE: The energetic Horse's restlessness can leave you feeling unsteady, yet their warmth is genuine. Neither hostile nor easy, this pairing simply asks for room to breathe.
notes.GOAT: The tender Goat is a kindred soul who shares your love of harmony and beauty. Together you create a gentle, nurturing sanctuary — one of your dearest connections.
notes.MONKEY: The clever Monkey's restless energy is a curiosity rather than a threat to you. You can enjoy their wit at a comfortable distance without much strain.
notes.ROOSTER: The blunt Rooster's sharp criticism wounds your sensitive heart deeply. Their candour and your need for tact pull painfully against each other.
notes.DOG: The faithful Dog offers the loyalty and protection that let you flourish. Their steadiness calms your worries — a tender, deeply secure bond.
notes.PIG: The generous Pig shares your warmth and gentle love of comfort. Kind and unhurried together, you build an affectionate and peaceful union.

2026.overall: The Year of the Horse brings a warmer, more sociable rhythm to Rabbit life. Horse energy gently coaxes you out of your comfortable shell and into rooms where new connections wait. The first half of the year favours quiet relationship-building over bold moves, while the autumn rewards a single decisive step you have long hesitated to take. Career progress comes through allies rather than confrontation. Guard your sensitive nature against the year's faster pace by protecting your rest and your boundaries.
2026.career: Advancement comes through collaboration and the goodwill you have patiently built. Let trusted allies open doors you would not push on alone.
2026.relationships: A tender relationship deepens through small, consistent kindnesses. For single Rabbits, an introduction in spring carries quiet promise.
2026.health: Protect your nervous system from the year's hurry. Gentle, regular movement and ample sleep keep you steady.
2026.finance: Modest, careful growth. Avoid lending to others and resist pressure to commit funds quickly.

monthlyFortune.1: January favours quiet planning. Sketch your hopes for the year before the pace picks up.
monthlyFortune.2: February brings a gentle social opening. Accept an invitation you would normally decline.
monthlyFortune.3: March is warm and fortunate. A relationship or creative pursuit blossoms.
monthlyFortune.4: April asks for patience with a misunderstanding. Soft words restore harmony.
monthlyFortune.5: May is one of your brightest months. Beauty, affection, and good news arrive together.
monthlyFortune.6: June is unsettled. Avoid overcommitting and guard against emotional exhaustion.
monthlyFortune.7: July rewards a small act of courage. Speak the truth you have been holding back.
monthlyFortune.8: August is rich and harmonious. Connections made now ripen beautifully later.
monthlyFortune.9: September favours home and family. Tend your nest and it will sustain you.
monthlyFortune.10: October brings a quiet financial improvement through patience and prudence.
monthlyFortune.11: November is strong and gracious. Recognition arrives for work done gently but well.
monthlyFortune.12: December is tiring. Withdraw, rest deeply, and let the year close in peace.

animals.name: Dragon
animals.personality: Dragons are the zodiac's visionaries — magnetic, ambitious, and brimming with creative fire. They think on a grand scale and inspire others simply by their presence, drawing people into bold undertakings that lesser spirits would never attempt. Their confidence and generosity are matched by a deep idealism. At their shadow side, Dragons can be arrogant, impatient with ordinary detail, and intolerant of those who cannot match their pace.

notes.RAT: The resourceful Rat adores your vision and lends sharp wit to your grand designs. They handle the details you find tedious, freeing you to dream — a lucky and exhilarating union.
notes.OX: The plodding Ox sees vanity where you see vision, and their caution drags at your momentum. You find them dull, they find you reckless, and the gulf rarely closes.
notes.TIGER: The brave Tiger matches your fire and shares your appetite for boldness. Two charismatic forces, you inspire each other to greatness when you agree to share the spotlight.
notes.RABBIT: The cautious Rabbit shrinks from the intensity you radiate so freely. No quarrel arises, but your scale and their reserve seldom truly meet.
notes.DRAGON: With another Dragon, the ambition is dazzling and the stage feels crowded. Two visionaries can build empires together or clash over who reigns — the fire burns bright either way.
notes.SNAKE: The wise Snake's quiet depth complements your blazing vision beautifully. They counsel where you charge ahead, and their subtle insight makes your dreams sharper.
notes.HORSE: The spirited Horse shares your love of momentum and bold gestures. Energetic and warm, you gallop well together so long as neither tries to rein the other in.
notes.GOAT: The timid Goat's worries and need for reassurance frustrate your impatient drive. You overwhelm them without meaning to, and harmony proves elusive.
notes.MONKEY: The inventive Monkey delights you with cleverness that serves your ambitions splendidly. Quick, lucky, and full of momentum, this is one of your most rewarding bonds.
notes.ROOSTER: The confident Rooster's pride and precision dovetail with your grandeur. You admire their diligence and they your vision — a striking, mutually flattering match.
notes.DOG: The skeptical Dog questions your grand plans and dampens your fire with worry. Their caution feels like distrust to you, and the friction between you runs deep.
notes.PIG: The good-natured Pig admires you and asks for little but warmth in return. An easy, agreeable connection where your confidence and their kindness coexist pleasantly.

2026.overall: The Year of the Horse stokes the Dragon's fire, and the two share a love of momentum and grand gestures. This is a year to launch the ambitious project you have been circling — the cosmic winds are at your back through the spring and early summer. Recognition and influence expand, but so does the temptation to overreach. Channel your visionary energy into one or two great efforts rather than scattering it across many. Relationships flourish when you remember to listen as well as inspire.
2026.career: A bold venture launched in the first half of the year carries far. Lead, but delegate the detail you find tedious.
2026.relationships: Your magnetism draws admirers easily this year. Depth comes from listening — let others shine beside you.
2026.health: Your energy is high but burns hot. Guard against burnout by building genuine rest into your ambitious schedule.
2026.finance: Strong earning potential. Invest in your grand vision but avoid the year's late-summer speculation.

monthlyFortune.1: January crackles with ambition. Define the great undertaking of your year.
monthlyFortune.2: February opens doors. An influential ally champions your vision.
monthlyFortune.3: March favours bold first steps. Launch what you have been planning.
monthlyFortune.4: April is one of your strongest months. Momentum and recognition build together.
monthlyFortune.5: May asks for patience with slower collaborators. Lead without dominating.
monthlyFortune.6: June rewards generosity. What you give to others returns multiplied.
monthlyFortune.7: July is brilliant and expansive. A major opportunity arrives — seize it.
monthlyFortune.8: August is challenging. Curb impatience and avoid impulsive financial moves.
monthlyFortune.9: September brings visible results from spring's bold beginnings.
monthlyFortune.10: October favours partnership. Share the stage and your reach grows.
monthlyFortune.11: November tests your humility. Listen more than you speak.
monthlyFortune.12: December invites reflection. Survey how far you have come and plan the next ascent.

animals.name: Snake
animals.personality: Snakes are the zodiac's deep thinkers — intuitive, perceptive, and gifted with a quiet, hypnotic charm. They observe far more than they reveal, moving toward their aims with patience and subtle strategy rather than open force. Their wisdom and elegance are matched by a strong inner life and refined taste. At their shadow side, Snakes can be secretive, possessive, and prone to a suspicion that isolates them from those who care for them.

notes.RAT: The clever Rat matches your strategic mind, though their restlessness contrasts your stillness. With trust this becomes a thoughtful, evenly matched alliance.
notes.OX: The patient Ox shares your love of quiet depth and steady purpose. You trust their constancy and they value your wisdom — a serene, profoundly stable bond.
notes.TIGER: The brash Tiger's open intensity collides with your guarded subtlety. They demand directness you will not give, and suspicion festers where understanding should grow.
notes.RABBIT: The gentle Rabbit shares your refined taste and dislike of conflict. A graceful, low-friction companionship flourishes when you lower your guard enough to be known.
notes.DRAGON: The radiant Dragon's vision finds a perfect counsellor in your quiet insight. You temper their fire with wisdom, and they draw you out of the shadows — a fine pairing.
notes.SNAKE: With another Snake, the depth is profound and the understanding wordless. Two such private souls share rare intimacy, though you must guard against mutual secrecy.
notes.HORSE: The galloping Horse moves far too fast for your contemplative nature. There is no malice between you, only a difference in tempo that keeps you politely apart.
notes.GOAT: The artistic Goat shares your sensitivity and love of beauty. Their gentleness poses no threat to your reserve, and a calm, refined rapport can grow.
notes.MONKEY: The tricky Monkey's cleverness rivals your own, breeding rivalry rather than trust. You suspect their motives and they tire of your secrecy — a wary, uneasy match.
notes.ROOSTER: The precise Rooster admires your composure and shares your discerning eye. You respect their diligence and they your wisdom — an elegant, deeply compatible union.
notes.DOG: The loyal Dog offers honesty you can rely upon, even if their worries differ from your calm. A steady, trustworthy connection when you let them in.
notes.PIG: The trusting Pig's open warmth feels naive to your watchful nature, and you guard yourself where they give freely. The mismatch in trust strains this pairing.

2026.overall: The Year of the Horse moves at a pace the contemplative Snake does not naturally favour, making this a year to choose your moments with characteristic precision. Rather than matching the Horse's gallop, let it carry you toward a single, well-chosen goal while you conserve your subtle strength. Your intuition is exceptionally sharp this year — trust the quiet inner signals that others overlook. Career rewards come to those who position themselves wisely behind the scenes. Guard against the suspicion that can sour otherwise promising relationships.
2026.career: Strategic positioning matters more than visible effort this year. A quiet move made in spring pays off handsomely by autumn.
2026.relationships: Your depth attracts a meaningful bond, but only if you let your guard down. Trust offered is trust returned.
2026.health: Your inner intensity needs an outlet. Meditation and reflective practice keep your mind clear and your body calm.
2026.finance: Shrewd, patient gains. A well-researched investment quietly outperforms; avoid acting on others' urgency.

monthlyFortune.1: January favours quiet observation. Watch and learn before you commit.
monthlyFortune.2: February is fortunate. Your intuition guides you to an unexpected advantage.
monthlyFortune.3: March rewards patient strategy. A long game begins to pay off.
monthlyFortune.4: April asks for discretion. Keep your plans to yourself a little longer.
monthlyFortune.5: May is challenging. Resist suspicion and give a trusted person the benefit of the doubt.
monthlyFortune.6: June is strong and clear. A well-timed move advances your position.
monthlyFortune.7: July is unsettled. Avoid hasty decisions made under social pressure.
monthlyFortune.8: August favours refinement. Polish what you have built rather than expanding it.
monthlyFortune.9: September is one of your brightest months. Quiet effort earns visible reward.
monthlyFortune.10: October deepens an important relationship through honesty.
monthlyFortune.11: November rewards careful financial study. Research before you commit.
monthlyFortune.12: December is wise and fortunate. Close the year having quietly achieved much.

animals.name: Horse
animals.personality: Horses are the free spirits of the zodiac — energetic, warm-hearted, and forever drawn toward the open horizon. They love movement, adventure, and the company of others, throwing themselves into life with infectious enthusiasm. Their independence and honesty win them many friends, and they inspire others to chase their own freedom. At their shadow side, Horses can be impatient, restless to the point of inconstancy, and inclined to bolt from commitments that begin to feel confining.

notes.RAT: The security-loving Rat is your zodiac opposite, craving the stability your wandering heart resists. Their need to hold on and your need to roam pull constantly against each other.
notes.OX: The deliberate Ox cannot keep up with your restless pace, and you chafe at their immovability. Patience against impulse makes this a wearing, ill-fitting match.
notes.TIGER: The bold Tiger shares your fire and thirst for adventure. Spirited and warm, you charge toward the horizon together — one of your most exhilarating bonds.
notes.RABBIT: The gentle Rabbit's caution differs from your boldness, yet there is real warmth between you. Give them room and reassurance, and this becomes a pleasant, easy companionship.
notes.DRAGON: The grand Dragon matches your love of momentum and bold gestures. Energetic together, you gallop well so long as neither tries to rein the other in.
notes.SNAKE: The contemplative Snake moves at a pace your spirit cannot abide. No quarrel divides you, only a difference in tempo that keeps you comfortably distant.
notes.HORSE: With another Horse, life is a shared adventure of freedom and warmth. Two free spirits understand each other perfectly, though constancy is the lesson you must both learn.
notes.GOAT: The tender Goat is a treasured ally whose gentleness soothes your restless heart. You lend them courage and they lend you comfort — a warm, harmonious union.
notes.MONKEY: The playful Monkey keeps pace with your energy and shares your love of novelty. Lively and entertaining together, this is an easy, spirited rapport.
notes.ROOSTER: The exacting Rooster's need for order grates against your love of freedom. They want commitments you resist, and the friction between you is real.
notes.DOG: The faithful Dog offers loyalty that grounds your wandering spirit without caging it. Their devotion and your warmth make a deeply trusting, affectionate bond.
notes.PIG: The good-natured Pig enjoys your enthusiasm and asks little but warmth. A relaxed, agreeable pairing where your energy and their ease coexist happily.

2026.overall: This is your year — the Year of the Horse — and it brings the surge of vitality and opportunity you thrive on. Doors open readily, journeys both literal and figurative call to you, and your natural enthusiasm meets a world ready to respond. Yet the tradition warns that one's own zodiac year (ben ming nian) can be turbulent as well as bright, so temper your gallop with a little caution. Wear a touch of red for protection, honour your commitments, and the year delivers remarkable growth. Love and friendship flourish wherever you bring your warmth.
2026.career: Opportunities arrive in abundance — choose the one worth committing to rather than chasing every horizon. Bold moves made early are favoured.
2026.relationships: Your charisma is irresistible this year. The challenge is constancy: stay where your heart truly is and the bond deepens.
2026.health: High energy can tip into recklessness in your own year. Channel your vigour into exercise and avoid taking physical risks.
2026.finance: Earnings flow freely but so does spending. Save during the strong months to cushion the impulsive ones.

monthlyFortune.1: January bursts with vitality. Set your sights high — this is your year.
monthlyFortune.2: February favours travel and new connections. Say yes to adventure.
monthlyFortune.3: March rewards a bold professional move. Momentum is on your side.
monthlyFortune.4: April is restless and tricky. Slow down and honour your commitments.
monthlyFortune.5: May is one of your brightest months. Opportunity and affection arrive together.
monthlyFortune.6: June asks for follow-through. Finish what your enthusiasm began.
monthlyFortune.7: July favours friendship and collaboration. You inspire those around you.
monthlyFortune.8: August is strong and fortunate. A long-held goal comes within reach.
monthlyFortune.9: September is challenging. Curb impulsiveness and avoid physical risks.
monthlyFortune.10: October rewards constancy in love. Stay present and the bond deepens.
monthlyFortune.11: November is bright and expansive. Recognition and reward arrive.
monthlyFortune.12: December invites you to rest your tireless spirit and reflect on a remarkable year.

animals.name: Goat
animals.personality: Goats are the zodiac's gentle artists — tender-hearted, imaginative, and deeply attuned to beauty and feeling. They create harmony around them and offer compassion freely, often sensing the unspoken needs of others before they are voiced. Their creativity and kindness make them beloved, and they flourish in supportive, peaceful surroundings. At their shadow side, Goats can be insecure, overly dependent, and prone to worry that drains their natural sweetness.

notes.RAT: The quick-witted Rat moves through cleverness where you move through feeling. Neither helps nor hinders the other greatly, and gentleness on your part keeps things easy.
notes.OX: The stern Ox's inflexibility leaves little room for your need of reassurance. Their reserve meets your worry, and the warmth you crave proves hard to find.
notes.TIGER: The fierce Tiger's intensity can overwhelm you, yet their strength may also shelter your tender heart. Approached gently, there is more comfort here than conflict.
notes.RABBIT: The gentle Rabbit is a kindred soul who shares your love of harmony and beauty. Together you create a nurturing, peaceful haven — one of your dearest bonds.
notes.DRAGON: The forceful Dragon's grand impatience unsettles your sensitive nature. You shrink where they surge, and the encouragement you need rarely arrives.
notes.SNAKE: The elegant Snake shares your artistic soul and dislike of discord. Their composure poses no threat to you, and a calm, refined rapport can quietly bloom.
notes.HORSE: The warm Horse is among your finest allies, lending courage to your dreams. Their confidence steadies your worries while your tenderness softens them — a harmonious union.
notes.GOAT: With another Goat, life is gentle, creative, and deeply understanding. Two tender hearts nurture each other beautifully, though someone must summon the resolve to decide.
notes.MONKEY: The clever Monkey's restless energy is more curiosity than threat to you. You can enjoy their wit at a comfortable, unpressured distance.
notes.ROOSTER: The blunt Rooster's criticism stings, but their diligence need not clash with your softness. A workable pairing if their candour is kept kind.
notes.DOG: The anxious Dog's worries amplify your own, and their critical streak wounds your gentle heart. Two sensitive souls can spiral together rather than soothe.
notes.PIG: The generous Pig shares your warmth and love of comfort. Kind and unhurried together, you build an affectionate, peaceful bond.

2026.overall: The Year of the Horse is warm and supportive for Goats, who count the Horse among their finest allies. This year's lively energy lifts your spirits and surrounds you with the encouragement you need to flourish. Creative work is especially favoured — what you make from the heart this year finds an appreciative audience. Lean on the Horse's confidence to act on the dreams you usually only imagine. Guard your sensitive nature from worry, and let supportive friends carry you past your moments of self-doubt.
2026.career: Creative and caring work is richly rewarded. A supportive ally helps you act on ideas you would otherwise leave unspoken.
2026.relationships: A warm, secure bond grows this year. Surround yourself with kind people and your confidence blossoms.
2026.health: Worry is your chief health risk. Build calming routines and lean on others when anxiety rises.
2026.finance: Gentle, steady improvement. A creative pursuit may bring unexpected income.

monthlyFortune.1: January favours gentle beginnings. Nurture one cherished idea into life.
monthlyFortune.2: February is warm and fortunate. Supportive friends lift your spirits.
monthlyFortune.3: March is uncertain. Resist worry and lean on those who love you.
monthlyFortune.4: April rewards creative work. What you make from the heart is well received.
monthlyFortune.5: May is one of your brightest months. Confidence and affection grow together.
monthlyFortune.6: June favours home and harmony. Tend your peaceful nest.
monthlyFortune.7: July is strong and tender. A relationship deepens beautifully.
monthlyFortune.8: August asks for a small act of self-trust. Decide and the path clears.
monthlyFortune.9: September is challenging. Protect your sensitive nature and rest often.
monthlyFortune.10: October brings welcome recognition for your gentle, devoted efforts.
monthlyFortune.11: November favours connection. Reach out and you will be warmly met.
monthlyFortune.12: December closes the year in comfort. Rest among those who cherish you.

animals.name: Monkey
animals.personality: Monkeys are the zodiac's clever inventors — quick, curious, and endlessly inventive in solving problems others find impossible. Their wit and sociability make them delightful company, and their adaptability lets them thrive in almost any situation. They love a challenge and the chance to outsmart it. At their shadow side, Monkeys can be mischievous to the point of unreliability, restless, and tempted to use their cleverness for shortcuts rather than honest effort.

notes.RAT: The resourceful Rat is your ideal playmate, quick and witty in the same key as you. You scheme and laugh together effortlessly — one of your most delightful and lucky bonds.
notes.OX: The steady Ox anchors your flightiness and rewards your humour with reliability. A surprisingly fine fit when you let their steadiness ground your busy mind.
notes.TIGER: The proud Tiger bristles at your tricks and refuses to be outwitted. Your cleverness and their pride strike sparks, making for a prickly, competitive pairing.
notes.RABBIT: The gentle Rabbit observes your antics with mild curiosity rather than alarm. You can enjoy their calm company at an easy, unhurried distance.
notes.DRAGON: The visionary Dragon adores your inventiveness and puts it to grand use. Quick, lucky, and full of momentum, this is among your most rewarding alliances.
notes.SNAKE: The watchful Snake rivals your cunning, breeding suspicion rather than trust. They tire of your tricks and you of their secrecy — a wary, uneasy match.
notes.HORSE: The spirited Horse keeps pace with your energy and shares your love of novelty. Lively and entertaining together, you make an easy, animated rapport.
notes.GOAT: The tender Goat's gentleness is no threat to your quick mind. You can appreciate their sweetness from a comfortable, unpressured distance.
notes.MONKEY: With another Monkey, the wit is dazzling and the games never end. Two clever inventors spark endless fun, though follow-through is the discipline you must share.
notes.ROOSTER: The exacting Rooster's precision contrasts your improvisation without real hostility. You both prize cleverness, and a balanced rapport is possible with patience.
notes.DOG: The earnest Dog's loyalty steadies your restlessness, even if their worries puzzle you. A workable, dependable connection when you honour their sincerity.
notes.PIG: The trusting Pig is too easily taken in by your schemes, and guilt or friction follows. Their open faith and your opportunism rarely settle comfortably together.

2026.overall: The Year of the Horse keeps the restless Monkey wonderfully engaged, offering a steady stream of fresh problems to solve and novelties to explore. Your quick mind is perfectly suited to the year's fast pace, and clever solutions you devise now earn real recognition. The key to a great year is finishing what you start — your appetite for new diversions can scatter your considerable talent. Channel your inventiveness into one ambitious project and see it through. Friendships multiply, and a playful approach opens doors that earnestness would not.
2026.career: Your ingenuity is in demand. A clever solution earns recognition — but follow it through to completion to claim the full reward.
2026.relationships: Your wit attracts many, yet depth requires you to stay put. Choose presence over the next exciting distraction.
2026.health: Mental restlessness can disturb your sleep. Give your busy mind a creative outlet and a firm bedtime.
2026.finance: Quick opportunities abound. Pursue the legitimate ones and resist the temptation of risky shortcuts.

monthlyFortune.1: January sparks fresh ideas. Pick the most promising and commit to it.
monthlyFortune.2: February is tricky. Avoid shortcuts and finish what you have begun.
monthlyFortune.3: March rewards your ingenuity. A clever move advances your standing.
monthlyFortune.4: April favours collaboration. Your wit makes you the heart of any team.
monthlyFortune.5: May asks for follow-through. See a lingering project to completion.
monthlyFortune.6: June is bright and busy. Opportunity arrives for those who deliver.
monthlyFortune.7: July favours learning something new. Curiosity opens an unexpected door.
monthlyFortune.8: August is one of your strongest months. Recognition follows real results.
monthlyFortune.9: September rewards loyalty in friendship. Stay present for those who matter.
monthlyFortune.10: October is unsettled. Resist boredom and avoid risky shortcuts.
monthlyFortune.11: November is fortunate. A finished project brings well-earned reward.
monthlyFortune.12: December invites you to consolidate gains and plan your next clever venture.

animals.name: Rooster
animals.personality: Roosters are the zodiac's confident perfectionists — observant, hardworking, and proud of a job done precisely right. They have a sharp eye for detail and a flair for presentation, and they speak their minds with unflinching honesty. Their diligence and reliability earn deep respect. At their shadow side, Roosters can be critical, vain, and so exacting that they exhaust both themselves and the people around them.

notes.RAT: The charming Rat deflects your honest critiques with cleverness that frustrates you. Their need to charm and your need to correct rarely find common ground.
notes.OX: The diligent Ox shares your respect for work done precisely right. You admire their endurance and they your standards — a productive, mutually respectful bond.
notes.TIGER: The impulsive Tiger resists your corrections and prizes the independence you'd refine. You can coexist, but your exactness and their freedom keep a careful distance.
notes.RABBIT: The sensitive Rabbit recoils from your blunt candour, taking your critiques to heart. Your honesty and their need for tact pull painfully against each other.
notes.DRAGON: The grand Dragon's vision pairs handsomely with your precision and pride. You admire their scale and they your diligence — a striking, flattering match.
notes.SNAKE: The discerning Snake shares your refined eye and composed nature. You respect their wisdom and they your standards — an elegant, deeply compatible union.
notes.HORSE: The free-roaming Horse resists the order you cherish, seeking adventure over commitment. Neither hostile nor easy, this pairing simply pulls in different directions.
notes.GOAT: The gentle Goat softens under criticism you must remember to temper. A workable rapport when your candour is offered with kindness rather than edge.
notes.MONKEY: The improvising Monkey contrasts your precision without real hostility. You both value cleverness, and a balanced connection grows with a little patience.
notes.ROOSTER: With another Rooster, the standards are high and the honesty unflinching. Two perfectionists can build something flawless or exhaust each other — temper the critique with care.
notes.DOG: The worried Dog's pessimism meets your criticism, and the two sour easily together. Their wariness and your bluntness make for a tense, uneasy match.
notes.PIG: The good-natured Pig accepts your candour with easy warmth and little offence. A relaxed pairing where your standards and their kindness coexist pleasantly.

2026.overall: The Year of the Horse moves quickly past the meticulous Rooster, who prefers everything in its proper order, making this a year to loosen your grip on perfection. Progress comes to those who can accept good enough and adapt on the move rather than polishing every detail. Your hard work is noticed and rewarded, but pair it with flexibility and the year flourishes. Relationships improve markedly when you soften your honest critiques into encouragement. Trust that not everything must be flawless for it to succeed.
2026.career: Your diligence earns advancement, but flexibility unlocks it. Adapt to changing plans rather than insisting on the original blueprint.
2026.relationships: Soften your honesty into kindness this year. Encouragement, not critique, deepens the bonds you value.
2026.health: Perfectionism breeds tension. Schedule genuine downtime and let some standards relax for the sake of your nerves.
2026.finance: Disciplined saving pays off. A well-organised budget grows steadily through the year.

monthlyFortune.1: January favours organisation. Set clear systems for the year ahead.
monthlyFortune.2: February rewards adaptability. Bend with a change rather than resisting it.
monthlyFortune.3: March brings recognition for diligent work. Accept praise graciously.
monthlyFortune.4: April is one of your strongest months. Effort and reward align.
monthlyFortune.5: May asks for patience with imperfection. Good enough truly is enough.
monthlyFortune.6: June is challenging. Soften your criticism and protect your relationships.
monthlyFortune.7: July favours career advancement through flexible cooperation.
monthlyFortune.8: August rewards careful financial planning. Your budget bears fruit.
monthlyFortune.9: September favours honest conversation tempered with kindness.
monthlyFortune.10: October is bright and productive. A well-organised effort succeeds.
monthlyFortune.11: November is tense. Relax your standards and rest your busy mind.
monthlyFortune.12: December invites you to take pride in a year of solid, disciplined work.

animals.name: Dog
animals.personality: Dogs are the zodiac's faithful guardians — loyal, honest, and driven by a deep sense of justice. They stand by the people and principles they believe in with unwavering devotion, and they can be counted on in any crisis. Their sincerity and protective warmth make them trusted friends and steadfast partners. At their shadow side, Dogs can be anxious, stubborn, and quick to expect the worst, carrying worries that weigh on their generous hearts.

notes.RAT: The clever Rat offers steadiness you can trust, even when their optimism outruns your caution. A workable, dependable connection built with a little patience.
notes.OX: The reliable Ox embodies the dependability you prize most. A steady, undramatic bond grounded in shared loyalty and honest work.
notes.TIGER: The brave Tiger fights for the causes you believe in, and you stand faithfully at their side. Their fire and your devotion forge a deeply protective, trusting union.
notes.RABBIT: The gentle Rabbit flourishes under the loyalty and protection you offer. Their grace calms your worries — a tender, profoundly secure bond.
notes.DRAGON: The boastful Dragon's grand plans rouse your skepticism and worry. Your caution feels like distrust to them, and the friction between you runs deep.
notes.SNAKE: The composed Snake offers a calm honesty you can rely upon, though their reserve differs from your candour. A steady connection when trust is earned.
notes.HORSE: The warm Horse grounds beautifully in your faithful devotion without feeling caged. Their energy and your loyalty make a trusting, affectionate bond.
notes.GOAT: The anxious Goat amplifies your own worries, and your critical streak troubles their tender heart. Two sensitive souls can spiral rather than soothe.
notes.MONKEY: The restless Monkey is steadied by your sincerity, even if their tricks puzzle you. A dependable rapport when their playfulness meets your honest heart.
notes.ROOSTER: The critical Rooster's bluntness meets your wariness, and the two sour quickly. Their candour and your pessimism make a tense, uneasy pairing.
notes.DOG: With another Dog, loyalty and honesty run deep and true. Two faithful guardians trust each other completely, though you must lift each other past shared worry.
notes.PIG: The generous Pig's warmth eases your anxious heart with easy kindness. A gentle, sincere bond where neither troubles the other.

2026.overall: The Year of the Horse is encouraging for Dogs, who find a loyal and energetic ally in the Horse. The year's optimism is exactly the tonic for your worry-prone heart, lifting burdens you have carried too long. Your faithfulness is rewarded with deeper trust and new opportunities offered by those who value your integrity. Take a brave step toward a goal you have hesitated over — the supportive winds are with you. Let go of pessimism and allow yourself to expect good things; this year, they are coming.
2026.career: Your integrity attracts opportunity and trust. A role offered by someone who values your reliability proves a fine fit.
2026.relationships: Loyalty is richly rewarded this year. A faithful bond deepens, and your devotion is met in kind.
2026.health: Release the worry you habitually carry. Time in nature and the company of friends restores your spirits.
2026.finance: Steady, honest gains. A prudent decision made with a trusted advisor improves your footing.

monthlyFortune.1: January favours a fresh, hopeful start. Set aside an old worry.
monthlyFortune.2: February is warm and fortunate. Loyalty earns you a welcome reward.
monthlyFortune.3: March rewards a brave step toward a long-held goal.
monthlyFortune.4: April is anxious. Lean on trusted friends and avoid expecting the worst.
monthlyFortune.5: May is one of your brightest months. Trust and opportunity grow together.
monthlyFortune.6: June favours fairness. Standing up for what is right earns lasting respect.
monthlyFortune.7: July is challenging. Guard against pessimism and protect your peace.
monthlyFortune.8: August is strong and steady. A faithful effort bears real fruit.
monthlyFortune.9: September deepens an important bond through honesty and devotion.
monthlyFortune.10: October rewards prudent financial choices made with good counsel.
monthlyFortune.11: November is bright. Your integrity is recognised and rewarded.
monthlyFortune.12: December closes the year in warmth. Rest among loyal friends.

animals.name: Pig
animals.personality: Pigs are the zodiac's generous souls — sincere, good-natured, and blessed with a warm capacity for enjoyment and contentment. They give freely of themselves, trust readily, and find genuine pleasure in life's comforts and in the happiness of others. Their honesty and easygoing kindness make them deeply likeable. At their shadow side, Pigs can be naive, self-indulgent, and so trusting that they are taken advantage of by those less scrupulous.

notes.RAT: The charming Rat enjoys your easy warmth and asks little in return. A relaxed, agreeable pairing, though you should keep a watchful eye on their cleverer schemes.
notes.OX: The dependable Ox offers steady warmth that suits your sincere heart. Neither troubles the other, and a comfortable, kindly rapport grows between you.
notes.TIGER: The bold Tiger admires your generosity and shelters you gladly without rivalry. Their courage and your warmth make a comfortable, affectionate bond.
notes.RABBIT: The gentle Rabbit shares your love of comfort and harmony. Kind and unhurried together, you build an affectionate, peaceful union.
notes.DRAGON: The grand Dragon enjoys your admiration and asks only warmth in return. An easy, agreeable connection where their confidence and your kindness sit pleasantly side by side.
notes.SNAKE: The guarded Snake finds your open trust naive, and you cannot fathom their secrecy. The mismatch in how freely you each give of yourselves strains this pairing.
notes.HORSE: The spirited Horse enjoys your good nature and easy company. A relaxed, agreeable rapport where their energy and your warmth coexist happily.
notes.GOAT: The tender Goat shares your warmth and gentle love of comfort. Kind and unhurried, you create a sweet, affectionate, and harmonious bond.
notes.MONKEY: The cunning Monkey too easily takes advantage of your open trust, leaving friction in their wake. Your generous faith and their opportunism rarely settle well together.
notes.PIG: With another Pig, life is generous, sincere, and full of shared comfort. Two warm hearts enjoy each other completely, though you must together guard against indulgence and misplaced trust.
notes.ROOSTER: The blunt Rooster's candour you accept with easy good humour and little offence. A relaxed pairing where their standards and your kindness coexist comfortably.
notes.DOG: The faithful Dog's loyalty meets your sincerity warmly, easing their anxious heart. A gentle, honest bond where neither troubles the other.

2026.overall: The Year of the Horse brings a cheerful, sociable energy that suits the warm-hearted Pig well. Good fortune flows toward you through the many friendships you cultivate, and your generosity returns to you in unexpected kindnesses. This is a year of comfortable progress rather than dramatic upheaval — enjoy its pleasures, but keep a watchful eye on your trusting nature. Not everyone deserves the open-handed faith you offer so freely. Protect your resources from those who would exploit your good heart, and the year is genuinely abundant.
2026.career: Goodwill and honest effort carry you forward. A friendly collaboration opens a comfortable new opportunity.
2026.relationships: Warmth and sincerity deepen your bonds. A relationship grows happily, nourished by your generous spirit.
2026.health: Enjoy life's comforts in moderation. Balance your love of indulgence with regular, gentle activity.
2026.finance: Income flows steadily, but guard against the gullible generosity that drains it. Verify before you lend or invest.

monthlyFortune.1: January is warm and sociable. Friendships sown now bear fortune later.
monthlyFortune.2: February favours honest effort. Steady work earns comfortable reward.
monthlyFortune.3: March is bright and lucky. Goodwill returns to you generously.
monthlyFortune.4: April rewards generosity given wisely. Help where it is truly needed.
monthlyFortune.5: May is challenging. Guard your trust and verify before you commit.
monthlyFortune.6: June is one of your strongest months. Comfort and progress arrive together.
monthlyFortune.7: July favours family and shared pleasures. Gather those you love.
monthlyFortune.8: August asks for caution with money. Protect your resources from exploitation.
monthlyFortune.9: September is fortunate. A friendly collaboration opens a fine opportunity.
monthlyFortune.10: October rewards moderation. Enjoy life's comforts without excess.
monthlyFortune.11: November deepens a cherished relationship through sincere warmth.
monthlyFortune.12: December closes the year in abundance. Celebrate among loyal friends.
